title: TestingSkill
description: Generates complete pytest test suites for migration pipeline components (v2.0.0)

ComponentType.description: Category of the component under test

TestType.description: Type of test suite to generate

source_code.description: The complete source code of the component to be tested

coverage_target_percent.description: Desired line coverage target. Higher values cause more edge cases and branches to be exercised.

test_code.description: Complete, runnable pytest test file content ready to save to disk

test_file_path.description: Recommended file path relative to the repository root (e.g. tests/unit/agents/test_execution_agent.py)

estimated_coverage.description: Estimated line coverage percentage the generated tests will achieve

test_count.description: Total number of test functions (def test_*) in the generated file

fixtures_required.description: Names of pytest fixtures the generated tests depend on — must be present in conftest.py

title: TestingSkill Envelope

standard_fixtures.description: Standard fixtures available in conftest.py that generated tests may reference

fixtures.name: mock_migration_api
fixtures.description: AsyncMock wrapping the migration API HTTP client

fixtures.name: mock_sf_client
fixtures.description: AsyncMock wrapping the Salesforce API client

fixtures.name: db_session
fixtures.description: SQLAlchemy Session bound to test database — rolled back after each test

fixtures.name: mock_anthropic_client
fixtures.description: AsyncMock wrapping anthropic.AsyncAnthropic — prevents real API calls in tests

output.test_code:
"""Unit tests for ExecutionAgent."""
import pytest
from unittest.mock import AsyncMock, patch


@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_execute_blocked_when_destructive_without_operator(
    sample_migration_id: str,
) -> None:
    from agents.execution_agent.agent import execute_single_step, PlanStep, StepStatus
    result = await execute_single_step(
        plan_step=PlanStep(
            step_id="test-step-001",
            step_type="bulk_delete",
            entity_name="Account",
            phase="loading",
            sequence_number=1,
            is_destructive=True,
        ),
        migration_id=sample_migration_id,
        tenant_id="test-tenant-001",
        operator_id=None,
    )
    assert result.status == StepStatus.BLOCKED
